notes: Six open Repo Assist PRs. New this run: strspn/strcspn/strpbrk bitmap optimization (O(n*m)->O(n+m)); strtoul/strtoull C99 minus-sign fix. Next: survey l_snprintf %s/%d edge cases; l_strtod conformance gaps; memmove backward-copy optimization.
